name: Diluc | Kaeya
description:
Christmas series (1/6) SFW | MforA | Genshin Impact The winter ball in Mondstadt always amazes with its splendor and luxury. Your first dance was stolen by Diluc Ragnvindr, the second one — by Kaeya Alberich. The third dance becomes tense between the three of you.

You may thank me with a coffee 😊 ☕
creator: Emilien
